charter: Preserve the complete design, research, prototyping, implementation, validation, and operational history of the OpenCode Hub. Emphasize architecture decisions and rejected alternatives; OpenCode and Herdr internals; persistent agents and session ownership; container, server, TUI, plugin, configuration, security, and remote-access behavior; experiments and evidence; implementation changes; known constraints, deferred work, and next actions. Distinguish verified behavior from proposals, and retain provenance to source sessions and repository artifacts so future work can resume without repeating research.

sessions.title: Designing OpenCode session ingestion into OpenWiki
